scripts.build:svelte-lexical: bun run --cwd vendor/svelte-lexical/packages/svelte-lexical svelte-kit sync && bun run --cwd vendor/svelte-lexical/packages/svelte-lexical svelte-package
scripts.dev: bun run build:svelte-lexical && concurrently "bun run --filter=@svg-table/app dev" "bun run --filter=boardgame-server start"
scripts.dev:app: bun run build:svelte-lexical && bun run --filter=@svg-table/app dev
scripts.dev:svg: bun run build:svelte-lexical && concurrently "bun run dev:svgcanvas" "cd svgedit && bun x vite dev --host --port 8001" "bun run --filter=@svg-table/app dev"
scripts.dev:svgcanvas: cd svgedit/packages/svgcanvas && bun x vite build --watch
scripts.build: bun run build:svelte-lexical && bun run --filter=@svg-table/app build
scripts.check: bun run build:svelte-lexical && bun run --filter=@svg-table/app check
scripts.check:watch: bun run build:svelte-lexical && bun run --filter=@svg-table/app check:watch
